C : Type u₁
inst✝ : Category.{v₁, u₁} C
X : Cᵒᵖ × (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁)
y : (yonedaPairing C).obj X
app✝ :
  (X_1 : Cᵒᵖ) →
    ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).1.unop.obj X_1 ⟶ ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).2.obj X_1

  ∀ ⦃X_1 Y : Cᵒᵖ⦄ (f : X_1 ⟶ Y),
    ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).1.unop.map f ≫ app✝ Y =
      app✝ X_1 ≫ ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).2.map f
w : ∀ (Y : Cᵒᵖ), { app := app✝, naturality := naturality✝ }.app Y = y.app Y
⊢ { app := app✝, naturality := naturality✝ } = y

case mk.mk
C : Type u₁
inst✝ : Category.{v₁, u₁} C

app✝¹ :
  (X_1 : Cᵒᵖ) →
    ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).1.unop.obj X_1 ⟶ ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).2.obj X_1
naturality✝¹ :
  ∀ ⦃X_1 Y : Cᵒᵖ⦄ (f : X_1 ⟶ Y),
    ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).1.unop.map f ≫ app✝¹ Y =
      app✝¹ X_1 ≫ ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).2.map f
app✝ :
  (X_1 : Cᵒᵖ) →
    ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).1.unop.obj X_1 ⟶ ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).2.obj X_1
naturality✝ :
  ∀ ⦃X_1 Y : Cᵒᵖ⦄ (f : X_1 ⟶ Y),
    ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).1.unop.map f ≫ app✝ Y =
      app✝ X_1 ≫ ((yoneda.op.prod (𝟭 (Cᵒᵖ ⥤ Type v₁))).obj X).2.map f
w : ∀ (Y : Cᵒᵖ), { app := app✝¹, naturality := naturality✝¹ }.app Y = { app := app✝, naturality := naturality✝ }.app Y
⊢ { app := app✝¹, naturality := naturality✝¹ } = { app := app✝, naturality := naturality✝ }
